overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a rainy nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit urban plaza. The player character moves through covered walkways, a grassy area beneath massive concrete structures, up illuminated stairs, and emerges into an open upper plaza dominated by a giant holographic koi fish advertisement.

massive concrete overpass structure with integrated lighting
tall vertical digital billboard displaying animated advertisements

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night beneath a massive concrete overpass in a futuristic city. The camera moves forward along a wet paved walkway, passing a distinctive yellow geometric structure on the left and illuminated digital advertising kiosks on the right. Sparse pedestrians walk through the neon-lit corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area approaching grassy section under overpass

events.description: approaching illuminated grassy area beneath the concrete structure

agents.ego_description: continuing forward while approaching a grassy area with people sitting

entered.detail: patch of green grass lit by overhead neon lights under the structure
support pillars with horizontal blue neon light strips

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper under the overpass, the scene transitions toward a grassy area illuminated by neon lights. The yellow structure recedes into the distance on the left while concrete pillars with glowing blue strips appear on the right. The environment remains sheltered from the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy lounge area beneath highway overpass with neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera moves onto a grassy area tucked beneath the massive concrete overpass, illuminated by horizontal neon light strips on the pillars. Two people sit conversing on the grass near a concrete planter. An 'EL GUAPO' billboard hangs overhead, and the environment feels like a sheltered urban park.

scene_state.functional_zone: illuminated concrete staircase leading to upper plaza

events.description: exiting grassy area and approaching wide concrete staircase
beginning ascent of stairs with blue neon step lighting

agents.ego_description: climbing illuminated concrete stairs toward upper plaza level, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian descending stairs while looking at phone

entered.detail: wide staircase with embedded blue neon lighting on steps and railings

segments.scene_description: Leaving the grassy area, the camera approaches and begins ascending a wide concrete staircase illuminated with blue neon strips. The overhead walkway structure shifts to the left as the camera climbs. Other pedestrians move up and down the stairs, and the environment remains sheltered but opens up toward the top.

scene_state.functional_zone: open upper plaza with giant holographic displays and circular bridge

events.description: emerging onto upper plaza revealing giant holographic koi fish display

agents.ego_description: walking across open upper plaza, observing the giant holographic fish and surrounding neon advertisements

entered.detail: massive glowing orange-red holographic koi fish swimming in the air above a circular structure
futuristic circular walkway or bridge with glass railings and blue lighting
wide open concrete plaza with puddles reflecting neon lights

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges onto a vast open upper plaza dominated by a spectacular giant holographic koi fish swimming above a circular bridge structure. The area is fully exposed to the rainy night sky, with massive digital billboards covering the surrounding skyscrapers. The wet pavement reflects the vibrant neon lights as the camera moves through this futuristic urban space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered, neon-lit underpass that gradually ascends into a vast, rain-soaked open plaza. It begins on a wet paved walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass, passing yellow geometric structures and digital kiosks as the camera pushes forward. As the path deepens, the scene shifts into a sheltered urban park area where the pavement gives way to grass and glowing blue pillars, passing beneath an EL GUAPO billboard. The camera then leaves the greenery to ascend a wide concrete staircase illuminated by blue neon strips, climbing toward the edge of the overhead structure. Finally, the movement emerges from the shelter into a wide upper plaza exposed to the rainy night sky, dominated by a giant holographic koi fish swimming above a circular bridge amidst towering digital billboards.
